chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 458 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.4728/2025 (U/A) 2. For hearing of MA No.2929/2025 (R/Surety) 04.09.2025 M/s Ashok Kumar K. Jamba and Asadullah Soomro, Advocates for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Learned Counsel for the applicant by way of his statement files certified copy of order dated 25.06.2025, passed by learned Additional Sessions Judge-X, Karachi South in Bail Application No.1932 of 2025. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety. As per contention of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Tarique Mehmood, who on 29.05.2025, was granted protective bail for a period of five days, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing an original defence savings certificate of such amount, has surrendered before the trial Court within prescribed period and obtained interim pre-arrest bail on 31.05.2025, which has subsequently been confirmed on 25.06.2025, as is evident from order dated 25.06.2025, placed before this Court today by way of statement. Ms. Shabana Naheed, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document, as above, to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
